questions.question: In paragraph 8, Teacher Zhang mentions that Ji-li “participates in educational reform”. What inference can be made about his motivation for bringing this up?

responses.content: she has to expose her family in front of everyone

questions.question:
Read the following passage from paragraph 10:

“I closed my eyes. I saw Dad standing on a stage, his head bowed, his name written in large black letters, and then crossed out in red ink, on a sign hanging from his neck. I saw myself standing in the middle of the stage, facing thousands of people, condemning Dad for his crimes, raising my fist to lead the chant, ‘Down with Jiang Xi-reng.’ I saw Dad looking at me hopelessly, tears on his face.”

What does this suggest about Ji-li's relationship with her father?

responses.content: Jiang Ji-li has always done well at school. In addition to doing very well in her studies, she participates in educational
Jiang ji-li is well in partipation  and I'd a good sudent
Jiang Ji-li has always done well at school

questions.question: Which of the following inferences about the interrogation is best supported by the text?

responses.content: Thin-Face and the woman left, saying they would be back to get my statement. Without knowing how I got there, I found myself in a narrow passageway between the school building and the school-yard wall. The gray concrete walls closed around me and a slow drizzle dampened my cheeks. I could not go back to the classroom, and I could not go home. I felt like a small animal that had fallen into a trap, alone and helpless, and sure that the hunter was coming.
she felt like a small animal that had fallen into a trap, alone and helpless, and sure that the hunter was coming.

questions.question: Which of the following best expresses a central idea of the excerpt?

responses.content: A. Parents in China are willing to sacrifice their children for their own political gain.

questions.question: Which sentence from the text most strongly supports the answer to the previous question?

responses.content: C. “‘I...I…’ I looked at Teacher Zhang for help. He looked away.”
